inspect.text: A wary stranger, sizing me up. They won't talk to someone empty-handed.

root.speaker: stranger
root.text: Oh — a new face. Careful out here after dark, stranger.

who.text: Just someone passing through. Like you.

strange.text: Strange? This whole street is strange after dark.

l.speaker: player
l.text: Someone passed through here recently… I should keep my eyes open.
